codeReview.summary: Clean extraction of 5 shared icon components into Icons.jsx with correct SVG markup preservation. All 10 inline SVGs in DashboardSections.js and GoalCard.js were replaced. The 2 ModuleList.js inline SVGs in the view toggle were partially addressed (GridIcon replaced, list icon remains inline as it has no shared counterpart). 3 additional inline SVGs in ModuleList.js (video, lab, flashcard info items) and 3 in App.js (sidebar nav) remain but are out of scope per the feature description which specifically targets the dashboard stat/goal metrics icons and the view toggle.

issues.description: ModuleList.js still has 3 inline SVGs for video, lab, and flashcard icons in the module card info items (lines 170, 190, 216). These are identical to the VideoIcon, LabIcon, and FlashcardsIcon in Icons.jsx. The feature description said '2' inline SVGs in ModuleList.js, so the worker correctly replaced only the 2 view-toggle icons (GridIcon + list icon). However, the remaining 3 are exact duplicates that could be cleaned up in a follow-up.

The React import is unnecessary in modern React (>=17) with the new JSX transform. However, since the project may not use the automatic JSX runtime, and other components in the codebase also import React explicitly, this is consistent with existing conventions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature description counted '12 inline SVGs' across the three files, but ModuleList.js actually had 5 inline SVGs (1 GridIcon in view toggle, 1 list-view icon, 1 video icon, 1 lab icon, 1 flashcard icon). The worker only replaced the GridIcon from the view toggle (plus noted the list icon has no shared counterpart). The 3 info-item SVGs in ModuleList.js are exact duplicates of Icons.jsx exports but were not in scope. This suggests the feature description's count of '12' may have undercounted ModuleList.js, or the scope intentionally excluded the info-item icons.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: ModuleList.js lines 170-225 still contain 3 inline SVGs matching VideoIcon, LabIcon, and FlashcardsIcon. Feature description says 'ModuleList.js (2)' implying only 2 replacements were expected.

sharedStateObservations.observation: App.js also contains 3 inline SVGs (sidebar nav icons at lines 323, 344, 365) including a GridIcon duplicate. These were correctly excluded from this feature's scope, but represent additional DRY violations for a potential follow-up.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: App.js:330 contains 'rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"' matching GridIcon in Icons.jsx

summary: The shared icon extraction is well-implemented. Icons.jsx exports all 5 required components (GridIcon, VideoIcon, LabIcon, FlashcardsIcon, CircularProgress) with correct SVG markup, className/size props, and CircularProgress's percentage/strokeColor props. DashboardSections.js and GoalCard.js fully replaced their inline SVGs. ModuleList.js replaced its GridIcon in the view toggle. Visual output is identical since exact SVG markup was preserved. Tests (426), lint (0 errors), format check, and build all pass. Two non-blocking observations: ModuleList.js still has 3 duplicate inline SVGs in module info items, and App.js sidebar has 3 more — both out of scope but worth noting for future cleanup.
